verses.text: A peace offering of the herd; the fat is burnt as a sweet savour. Peace offering. Fellowship with God is celebrated.
A peace offering of the herd; the fat is burnt as a sweet savour. Peace offering. Fellowship with God is celebrated.
A peace offering of the herd; the fat is burnt as a sweet savour. Peace offering. Fellowship with God is celebrated.
A peace offering of the herd; the fat is burnt as a sweet savour. Peace offering. Fellowship with God is celebrated.
A peace offering of the herd; the fat is burnt as a sweet savour. Peace offering. Fellowship with God is celebrated.
A peace offering of the flock is brought, with the laying on of hands. The flock. Fellowship is sought with a lamb.
A peace offering of the flock is brought, with the laying on of hands. The flock. Fellowship is sought with a lamb.
A peace offering of the flock is brought, with the laying on of hands. The flock. Fellowship is sought with a lamb.
Its fat and inwards are burnt as food of the offering. The fat. The richest part is given to God.
Its fat and inwards are burnt as food of the offering. The fat. The richest part is given to God.
Its fat and inwards are burnt as food of the offering. The fat. The richest part is given to God.
A peace offering of the goat is brought, with its fat. The goat. Another way to seek peace with God.
A peace offering of the goat is brought, with its fat. The goat. Another way to seek peace with God.
A peace offering of the goat is brought, with its fat. The goat. Another way to seek peace with God.
Its fat is burnt; 'all the fat is the LORD's'; eat no fat or blood. The fat and blood. The best belongs to God alone.
